results.title: Struggling Android phone maker prepares to pull out of US
results.description: Every disruptor sells the same promise. Pay less, get more, and watch the incumbents squirm. It is a thrilling pitch, and for a while it even works, because a hungry challenger will eat margin the giants refuse to touch. The problem is that the promise has a shelf life. Cheap is not a strategy. ...

results.title: 4,500 Google employees sign petition demanding layoff protections
results.description: More than 100 Google employees rallied outside the tech giant's headquarters in Mountain View Thursday, demanding job security protections. Union leaders from across the country delivered a petition signed by 4,500 workers to CEO Sundar Pichai and three other top Google executives. The action is...

results.title: 1969 Chevrolet Corvette Convertible L88 427/430 4-Speed
results.description: This 1969 Chevrolet Corvette is one of 216 examples equipped with the L88 package during three years of production and is one of 116 built for the 1969 model year. Configured as a convertible with an optional hardtop, the car was ordered new by a US serviceman stationed in South Korea for delivery via GM Overseas Distribution Corp. After its completion on April 9, 1969, the car was collected by its first owner in Atlanta, Georgia, upon his return to the US. It was purchased in 1978 by an NCRS and Bloomington judge, with whom it remained for two decades before passing through a series of collections. Finished in its original color combination of Le Mans Blue over black vinyl, the car retains a 427ci L88 V8 with aluminum cylinder heads, a performance camshaft, a 12.5:1 compression ratio, and a four-barrel Holley carburetor. Additional factory-optioned equipment includes a Muncie M22 four-speed manual transmission, a Positraction rear differential, heavy-duty suspension, power disc brakes, transistor ignition, an engine block heater, tinted glass, a rear window defroster, a hardtop covered in black vinyl, a black vinyl convertible top, shoulder belts, and an audio alarm system. Accolades accumulated by the car include MCACN Triple Diamond Certification, Bloomington Gold Certification, Bloomington Gold Survivor Certification, and NCRS Top Flight status as well as selection to five Bloomington Gold Special Collections and induction in the Bloomington Gold Hall of Fame. This L88 was purchased by its current owner in 2024 and is now offered on dealer consignment in Pennsylvania with a copy of its window sticker, delivery documents, an NCRS Shipping Data Report, a CCAS engine stamp affirmation certificate, owner correspondence letters, and a clean Montana title.

results.title: AI predictions for France vs. England World Cup third-place match
results.description: France and England are playing for third-place honors at the 2026 World Cup. USA TODAY Sports had Microsoft Copilot AI predict the match.
